summary: Canonical remains https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/41985. The hydrated artifact shows current main still only supports image-scoped Control UI/WebChat attachments, several sibling duplicates were already closed to #41985 on 2026-04-26, and the remaining open items split into true duplicates versus broader related follow-ups. Because no viable PR is hydrated and `require_fix_before_close` is enabled, this result keeps open duplicates non-mutating, emits a narrow non-image upload fix artifact, and marks only PR opening as blocked on missing checkout/patch material.
